contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: capoeira mobile follow-ups: overflow safety, Start Practice scroll, portrait videos, hide redundant preamble
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/15
  
  Details:
  Three rounds of mobile-testing follow-ups on capoeira.agroverse.shop, all surfaced by Gary running the live site on a phone after the initial mobile-optimization PR (#14).
  
  Round 1 — overflow safety + iOS bottom safe-area (PR #15, merged):
  - html, body { overflow-x: hidden } as a global safety net so any unforeseen wide element (long URL, oversized inline grid, embed) doesn't sideways-scroll the page and make vertical scrolling jittery.
  - body { padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px) } base + max(env(...), 96px) at <=600px, so iOS Safari's bottom toolbar / iPhone home-indicator doesn't hide the footer or bottom-of-page action buttons. 96px clears all device variants. Falls back to 0 on desktop so no space wasted.
  - viewport-fit=cover added to <meta name=viewport> on all four pages so env() actually returns non-zero on iOS.
  - Start Practice button: scrollIntoView with behavior:smooth, block:center on the next animation frame + 50ms after .hidden -> visible class change, so when the user clicks Generate Session the just-revealed button pops into view automatically instead of rendering below the fold.
  - scroll-margin-bottom: 96px on action anchors (#start-session-btn, .session-card, .now-playing, .donate-cta button) so scrollIntoView lands them above the toolbar.
  - Targeted overflow hot spots: .practice-layout > * { min-width: 0 } prevents grid blowout; .fee-calc { overflow-x: auto } for transparency.html's wide table; session-history.js inline grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr swapped for repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(220px, 100%), 1fr)) so the Themes + Top Moves panels stack on phones instead of squeezing.
  
  Round 2 — portrait video aspect ratio (commit 525df33):
  - Bico Duro's clips are filmed PORTRAIT (9:16) but .video-embed and .move-modal-video were forcing them into a landscape 16:9 frame (padding-bottom: 56.25%) — letterboxing the actual content with black bars on each side.
  - Switched both to aspect-ratio: 9 / 16; width: 100%; max-width: 360px; margin: 1rem auto. Modern aspect-ratio replaces the padding-bottom hack; max-width keeps a portrait video from dominating desktop layouts (at 360px wide the 9:16 frame is 640px tall — watchable, and the parent .now-playing / modal already scroll if needed).
  
  Round 3 — hide redundant preamble post-generate (commit 525df33):
  - Once a session is rendered, the Your Practice History + 'All data stored locally' + Generate a Session + Theme-based sequencing intro text feels redundant. Hidden as a block so the user only sees the actionable session card + Start Practice button.
  - practice.html: wrapped the heading + difficulty bias + Generate button in <div id='generator-preamble'> so the whole intro block can hide as a unit. Added two new buttons next to Start Practice: 'Generate Different' (re-runs generateFromUI without showing the preamble back) and '← Back' (calls CapoeiraPractice.reset to restore overview).
  - session-generator.js: on successful generation, hide #history-summary-section + #generator-preamble; reveal Regenerate / Back buttons.
  - practice-flow.js resetPractice(): mirror — restore the hidden elements + re-hide Regenerate / Back. Net result: session preview screen contains exactly session card + Start Practice + Generate Different + ← Back.
  
  Process honesty (flagging again so it's logged): commit 525df33 landed directly on origin/main without going through a PR — same worktree-state issue I made on the tokenomics offchain commit. Local branch was on main after the previous PR merge cleanup, and I committed without re-branching. Code is reviewed by Gary live (he confirmed 'wonderful'), but it bypassed the standard PR step. Going forward I'll explicitly run 'git checkout -b feature/...' before any commit to a ~/Applications repo, no exceptions.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 66.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
